title: lastrea microstegia
intro: Lastrea microstegia, also known as the Microstegia fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea microstegia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal uses.
